Monday 8th March 2021

Things that need to be done at some point:
1) Prep Sommers et al., (2020) 16S amplicon output for analysis - 01/03/2021 DONE
2) Carry out ordination analysis - 02/03/2021 - 03/03/2021 DONE
3) Go through pipeline with someone to check for issues - 04/03/2021 DONE
4) Test for DDR and ISAR - 05/03/2021 DONE
5) Multivariate analysis of community assembly mechanisms - 08/03/2021 - 09/03/2021
6) Make plan/prep for Svalbard - 08/03/2021
7) Phylogenetic null model analysis of community assembly mechanisms - 10/03/2021 - 12/03/2021
8) Neutral model analysis of community assembly mechanisms - 15/03/2021 - 17/03/2021
9) Co-occurence network analysis - 18/03/2021 - 19/03/2021
10) Find out how to word OceanParcels - 22/03/2021 - 24/03/2021
11) Read all James recommended papers and apply to progress report- 25/03/2021 - 26/03/2021
12) Complete progress report - 26/03/2021
13) Prep Community assembly presentation - 29/03/2021
14) Repeat analysis for rare/abundant taxa - 30/03/2021 - 31/03/2021
15) Repeat analysis for Sommers et al.,(2020) 18S data - 01/04/2021 - 02/04/2021

18) Analyse additional datasets - 19/04/2021 - 30/04/2021
19) Write up metadata results first draft - 03/05/2021- 14/05/2021

WEEK PLAN

MONDAY
1) Chemical analyses of snow/ice - What info do I NEED? What physio-chemical factors might impact community biogeography/assembly? How will I get it? What chemical analysis was James planning on doing? 
2) Write Step Three script - ordination
3) 12pm - Catch up with James: What do I need to do to prepare for next month? What do I need to bring? How do I bring it?
4) Write Step Four script - General stats
5) Read women in Glaciology https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/journal-of-glaciology/article/women-in-glaciology-a-historical-perspective/205304CE84CEFFCC59FA4BC83AB962AE

TUESDAY
1) Write ISAR script - use github to see how others have done this. What additional statistics need to be done on this analysis?
2) 11am Coffee morning
3) Write DDR script - use github to see how others have done this. What additional statistics need to be done on this analysis?

WEDNESDAY
1) Write multivariate analysis script for looking at how abiotic drivers of community assembly - use github to see how others have done this. What additional statistics need to be done on this analysis? What environmental variables are available to conduct this analysis?
2) 2pm NHM catch up

THURSDAY
1) Write phylogenetic null model analysis script

FRIDAY
